title: Why the Tour Starts at Alexanderplatz - Quick Summary
items: **Alexanderplatz gives Berlin a better first sentence:** the route starts with movement, GDR layers and the edge of the old city.
**The World Clock is an easy meeting point:** it is visible, central and already used by locals and visitors as a place to meet.
**Brandenburg Gate is essential, but not the best beginning:** it works better once the city around it makes sense.
**The route builds a mental map:** World Clock, TV Tower, medieval traces, GDR memory, Museum Island and Hackescher Markt.
**The tour ends somewhere useful:** Hackescher Markt is good for food, cafes, courtyards, trams, S-Bahn and the rest of your day.
